0.name: 1571 ARH-PVi Six6 Dopa-Gaba_1
0.rationale: ARH (arcuate hypothalamic nucleus) location matches MBA:223 target. Dopaminergic-GABAergic NT is biologically plausible for aromatase neurons — ARC aromatase neurons in the ventral ARH co-express dopamine machinery in some studies. Strikingly male-biased (ratio 5.25), the highest in the entire rank-0 candidate set — consistent with the expected male bias of arc_aromatase_neuron. Cyp19a1 does not appear in WMB cluster naming conventions but the ARH-Dopa-GABA + strong male bias combination is the best available proxy. Top rank-0 candidate.

0.name: 1572 ARH-PVi Six6 Dopa-Gaba_2
0.rationale: ARH location, Dopa-Gaba NT, male-biased (ratio 3.76). Second-best rank-0 candidate. Shares the Six6 transcription factor lineage with CLUS_1571, consistent with ARH Dopa-GABAergic identity. Strong male bias supports arc_aromatase_neuron. Parent SUPT_0428 (ARH-PVi Six6 Dopa-Gaba_2).

0.name: 1569 ARH-PVi Six6 Dopa-Gaba_1
0.rationale: ARH location, Dopa-Gaba NT — correct region and NT category. However, male_female_ratio=0.96 (balanced, no sex bias), which is inconsistent with the expected male enrichment. May represent a neighboring ARH dopaminergic subtype that does not correspond to the sexually dimorphic aromatase population specifically.

0.name: 1570 ARH-PVi Six6 Dopa-Gaba_1
0.rationale: ARH location, Dopa-Gaba NT, ratio=0.85 (slightly female-biased). Correct region and NT lineage but sex ratio does not support male bias. May be a sibling cluster to the aromatase population rather than the aromatase neurons themselves.

0.name: 1697 SBPV-PVa Six6 Satb2 Gaba_3
0.rationale: SBPV-PVa (subparaventricular/periventricular anterior) — adjacent to ARC but not ARC proper. Male-biased (ratio 3.0) is supportive. GABAergic, Six6 lineage. Adjacent periventricular zone neurons could include aromatase+ cells given the broad distribution (~6,000 aromatase neurons across hypothalamus) but not a primary candidate for the ARH-specific cluster.

0.name: 1839 TU-ARH Otp Six6 Gaba_1
0.rationale: TU-ARH (tuberal-arcuate) — includes ARC territory. Mildly male-biased (ratio 1.94). GABAergic, Otp/Six6 lineage. Not Dopa-Gaba like the primary candidates, but ARC GABA neurons can express aromatase. Lower priority than ARH-Dopa-Gaba clusters.

0.name: 1840 TU-ARH Otp Six6 Gaba_1
0.rationale: TU-ARH, GABAergic, mildly male-biased (ratio 1.70). Same reasoning as CLUS_1839.

0.name: 1852 TU-ARH Otp Six6 Gaba_2
0.rationale: TU-ARH, GABAergic, mildly male-biased (ratio 1.63). Same reasoning as CLUS_1839.

0.rationale: TU-ARH, GABAergic, ratio 1.50 (mildly male-biased). Same reasoning as CLUS_1839.

0.rationale: TU-ARH, GABAergic, ratio 1.44. Same reasoning as CLUS_1839.

0.name: 1853 TU-ARH Otp Six6 Gaba_3
0.rationale: TU-ARH, GABAergic, ratio 1.17 (near-balanced). Correct region but weak sex bias signal.

0.name: 1683 SBPV-PVa Six6 Satb2 Gaba_1
0.rationale: SBPV-PVa (periventricular), Dopa NT, male-biased (ratio 1.86). Not ARC proper. Periventricular dopaminergic neurons include A14 group but not the ARH aromatase cluster specifically.

0.name: 1686 SBPV-PVa Six6 Satb2 Gaba_1
0.rationale: SBPV-PVa, GABAergic, ratio 1.70. Adjacent periventricular, not ARC. Lower priority.

0.name: 1687 SBPV-PVa Six6 Satb2 Gaba_1
0.rationale: SBPV-PVa, GABAergic, ratio 0.96 (balanced — no sex bias). Not ARC. Wrong sex ratio.

0.rationale: DMH-LHA (dorsomedial hypothalamus/lateral hypothalamic area). Not ARC. Aromatase neurons span the hypothalamus broadly but the ARC-specific sexually dimorphic cluster is the target. Wrong primary region.

0.rationale: DMH-LHA, GABAergic, ratio 1.27. Wrong primary region for ARH-specific aromatase population.

0.name: 1849 TU-ARH Otp Six6 Gaba_2

0.name: 1850 TU-ARH Otp Six6 Gaba_2 [shared with pmv_otr_neuron candidates]
0.rationale: TU-ARH, ratio 1.13. Appears in pmv_otr_neuron candidate list (via SUPT_0479 lineage). Shared candidates across nodes suggest location overlap in the query index, not specificity.

0.name: 5246 Tanycyte NN_2
0.rationale: Non-neuronal cell type — tanycyte (radial glia-like ependymal cell of the third ventricle). Despite male-biased ratio (2.45) and ARC-adjacent location, tanycytes are not neurons and cannot correspond to the arc_aromatase_neuron (a classical neurochemically defined neuron type). Excluded on cell class grounds.

0.name: 5303 VLMC NN_4
0.rationale: Non-neuronal cell type — vascular leptomeningeal cell (VLMC). Not a neuron. Female-biased (ratio 0.12) — opposite of expected male bias. Excluded on cell class grounds.

1.name: 0427 ARH-PVi Six6 Dopa-Gaba_1
1.rationale: ARH (arcuate hypothalamic nucleus) location matches MBA:223. Dopaminergic-GABAergic NT is the biologically expected profile for ARC aromatase neurons — Cyp19a1-expressing ARH neurons co-express dopamine biosynthesis genes in the ventral ARH. Six6 marks a hypothalamic ARH lineage. Parent of CLUS_1569, 1570, 1571 (the strongly male-biased cluster is under this supertype). Top rank-1 recommendation; subsumes the STRONG rank-0 candidate CLUS_1571 (ratio 5.25).

1.name: 0428 ARH-PVi Six6 Dopa-Gaba_2
1.rationale: ARH location, Dopa-Gaba NT, Six6 lineage. Parent of CLUS_1572 (ratio 3.76, male-biased). Second STRONG rank-1 candidate; the two ARH-PVi Dopa-Gaba supertypes together span the most likely transcriptomic territory of the aromatase population.

1.name: 0478 TU-ARH Otp Six6 Gaba_1
1.rationale: TU-ARH location (tuberal-arcuate), GABAergic, Otp/Six6 lineage. Encompasses multiple mildly male-biased clusters (1839, 1840, 1841, 1842, 1843). Consistent with broader ARC GABAergic population that may include Cyp19a1+ neurons not captured by Dopa-Gaba naming.

1.name: 0479 TU-ARH Otp Six6 Gaba_2
1.rationale: TU-ARH, GABAergic, Otp/Six6 lineage. Parent of mildly male-biased clusters (1848, 1849, 1852). Same reasoning as SUPT_0478.

1.name: 0480 TU-ARH Otp Six6 Gaba_3
1.rationale: TU-ARH, GABAergic, Otp/Six6. Parent of CLUS_1853 (ratio 1.17). Lower priority than SUPT_0478/0479 due to weaker sex bias in child clusters.

1.name: 0493 ARH-PVp Tbx3 Gaba_1
1.rationale: ARH-PVp (arcuate-periventricular posterior), GABAergic, Tbx3 lineage. ARC location is correct. Tbx3 is a different transcription factor lineage than Six6/Otp aromatase neurons but cannot exclude without marker data.

1.name: 0494 ARH-PVp Tbx3 Gaba_2
1.rationale: ARH-PVp, GABAergic, Tbx3. Same reasoning as SUPT_0493.

1.name: 0495 ARH-PVp Tbx3 Gaba_3
1.rationale: ARH-PVp, GABAergic, Tbx3. Same reasoning as SUPT_0493.

1.name: 0558 ARH-PVp Tbx3 Glut_5
1.rationale: ARH-PVp, glutamatergic. ARC location is correct. Aromatase neurons can theoretically be glutamatergic but the Dopa-Gaba profile is more consistent with literature. Lower priority than GABAergic/Dopa-Gaba ARH supertypes.

1.name: 0455 SBPV-PVa Six6 Satb2 Gaba_3
1.rationale: SBPV-PVa (subparaventricular/periventricular anterior) — adjacent to ARC but not ARC proper. Parent of CLUS_1697 (male-biased, ratio 3.0). The periventricular zone aromatase neurons are part of the broader ~6,000-cell network but this supertype is not the primary ARC aromatase candidate.

1.name: 0453 SBPV-PVa Six6 Satb2 Gaba_1
1.rationale: SBPV-PVa, GABAergic. Not ARC proper. Same reasoning as SUPT_0455.

1.name: 0628 HY Gnrh1 Glut_1
1.rationale: Hypothalamus GnRH1-expressing glutamatergic supertype. GnRH neurons are anatomically adjacent to kisspeptin neurons but not to aromatase neurons in the ARC. Glutamatergic NT and GnRH marker do not match expected profile. Interesting for proximity context but not a credible mapping candidate.

1.name: 0470 DMH-LHA Gsx1 Gaba_1
1.rationale: DMH-LHA (dorsomedial hypothalamus/lateral hypothalamic area). Not ARC. Wrong primary region.

1.name: 0472 DMH-LHA Gsx1 Gaba_3
1.rationale: DMH-LHA, cholinergic/GABAergic (Chol annotation in child cluster). Wrong primary region.

1.name: 0481 TMd-DMH Foxd2 Gaba_1
1.rationale: TMd-DMH (tuberal mammillary dorsal/dorsomedial). Not ARC. Wrong region.

1.name: 0430 TMv-PMv Tbx3 Hist-Gaba_2
1.rationale: TMv-PMv (tuberal mammillary ventral/premammillary), histaminergic-GABAergic. Not ARC, wrong NT profile for aromatase neurons.

1.name: 0488 DMH Hmx2 Gaba_2
1.rationale: DMH (dorsomedial hypothalamus), GABAergic. Not ARC. Wrong primary region.

1.name: 1173 Tanycyte NN_2
1.rationale: Non-neuronal supertype — tanycytes. Not a neuron class. Excluded on cell class grounds.

1.name: 1174 Tanycyte NN_3
1.rationale: Non-neuronal supertype — tanycytes. Excluded on cell class grounds.

1.name: 1190 VLMC NN_4
1.rationale: Non-neuronal supertype — vascular leptomeningeal cells (VLMC). Excluded on cell class grounds.

non_candidates_summary: Cyp19a1 (aromatase) does not appear in any WMB cluster or supertype label in CCN20230722 — this is expected and was flagged as a possibility in the task instructions. The defining marker Cyp19a1 is sufficiently rare and cell-type-specific that it may not have been used as a cluster-defining marker in the WMB taxonomy, even if expressed. The search therefore falls back entirely to location (MBA:223 = ARC) and sex ratio as discriminators. Three non-neuronal cell types (Tanycyte NN_2, Tanycyte NN_3, VLMC NN_4) scored=2 on location alone and are excluded. The best candidates are two ARH-PVi Six6 Dopa-Gaba supertypes (SUPT_0427, SUPT_0428) and their child clusters, especially CLUS_1571 (ratio 5.25) and CLUS_1572 (ratio 3.76), which show strong male enrichment consistent with the known male bias of the arcuate aromatase population. Curator should request full marker lists for CLUS_1571 and CLUS_1572 from the taxonomy DB to check for Cyp19a1 co-expression before finalizing.
